productDisplayName: DKNY Women White Dial Chronograph Watch NY8057
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel back and a fixed bezel with embellishmentsDial style: White dial with steel-toned markings, has steel toned hour and minute hands with white inlay and cut-out detail, steel toned seconds handFeatures: Three-face chronograph display, date aperture, screw to reset the timeStrap style: Stainless steel bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature DKNY caseWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
